# Pirimid

> Connecting the workface to the design with Industrial AI for construction.

[Pirimid](https://pirimid.ai/) is an Industrial AI platform that optimizes construction productivity by connecting construction workface execution to design specifications. It uses operations science to compress project schedules, improve predictability, and optimize welding productivity.

Last updated: 2026-07-06

## Core Resources

- [Home](https://pirimid.ai/) - Main website outlining the business case, market opportunity, and an interactive digital twin schedule-simulation demo (insight summary available as static text under the chart for crawlers that do not run JavaScript).
- [Welding ROI Calculator](https://pirimid.ai/pirimid_roi_calculator.html) - Interactive tool to estimate monthly and annual savings, breakeven thresholds, and overall ROI based on welder count, hourly rate, and productivity improvements.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pirimid.ai/privacy.html) - Information on how Pirimid handles your data.

## Extended Detail

- [Full Platform Details](https://pirimid.ai/llms-full.txt) - Consolidated, text-only specification of the Pirimid platform, market opportunity, digital twin capabilities, and the welding ROI calculation models.

## Key Concepts

- **Workface-to-Design Connection:** Aligning real-time field data with design models to eliminate project execution latency.
- **Operations Science:** Scientific scheduling models and simulation algorithms powering a predictive digital twin.
- **Arc-Time Monitoring:** Directly monitoring weld times to measure real productivity and trigger root-cause decomposition for project delays.
